inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Although Chikungunya can cause joint pain, the presence of retro-orbital pain is more indicative of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific symptoms of retro-orbital and bone pain

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikaal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash and bleeding gums, along with the drop in fever, are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is unlikely given the specific combination of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely without symptoms of chills, sweats, and cyclical fever patterns

inputs.text: Abhi bhi bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, doctor ne kaha hai ki Dengue confirm hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to laboratory confirmation of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
